Aggregation.description: How to aggregate measurement values into a conclusion scalar.

DiffField.description: Either a boolean (uses `<step.name>.patch`) or an explicit patch filename.

EmbeddedSummaryToml.description: Summary definition embedded under a step. The summary's `name` and `step` fields are recovered from the map keys (`step.<step>.summary.<name>`).

aggregation.description: How to combine multiple matching values. Omit when the filter is expected to select a single value.

bisect.description: Trigger bisection when this summary regresses.

filter.description: Tag key=value filters applied before aggregation.

measurement.description: Measurement name (as emitted by the forager) to aggregate over.

samples.description: Number of forager invocations of the step to take. Lint requires all summaries on the same step to agree. Default 1.

StepBody.description: Body of a `[step.<tool>.<step_name>]` table. The tool name is recovered from the outer key, not a field; flatten-collected `rest` is forwarded to the forager plugin via `FORAGER_INPUTS` as JSON.

apply-diff.description: Apply a patch before running this step. `true` uses `<step name>.patch`; a string overrides the filename.

summary.description: Summaries emitted by this step, keyed by summary name.

description:
Top-level shape of `.wezel/experiments/<name>/experiment.toml`.

Steps live under `[step.<tool>.<step_name>]`. The outer map is keyed by tool name and the inner by step name; bodies are wrapped in `toml::Spanned` so the parser can recover file-line order across reopened tables.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the experiment measures.

step.description: `[step.<tool>.<step_name>]`. Two-level map; step names must be unique across tools (enforced in [`parse_experiment`]).

title: Wezel experiment.toml
